compliance_issues.message: Warning about 'Risk of Capital Loss' (Risque de perte en capital) is missing.
compliance_issues.context: No capital loss warning found in disclaimers
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add warning: 'Capital is not guaranteed and you may not get back the amount you invested'

compliance_issues.message: 5-year performance history not found. Required if the fund is older than 5 years.
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add 5-year performance data if fund is older than 5 years

compliance_issues.message: 10-year performance history not found. Required if the fund is older than 10 years.
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add 10-year performance data if fund is older than 10 years
Add a glossary section explaining technical terms used in the document

compliance_issues.message: Fund Name is missing on the cover page.
Document Date is missing on the cover page.
Risk Scale (SRI) is missing. It is usually required on Slide 2.
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add SRI scale (typically 1-7 risk scale) on slide 2

compliance_issues.message: Investment Horizon is missing. It is usually required on Slide 2.
compliance_issues.context: No investment horizon/recommended holding period found

compliance_issues.message: Fund characteristics section is missing. Should include investment objective and policy.
compliance_issues.suggestion: Add a 'Fund Characteristics' section with investment objective and policy

compliance_issues.message: Article 8 fund: ESG content exceeds 10% limit (48.73%)
compliance_issues.suggestion: Reduce ESG content to below 10% of total document text

compliance_issues.message: Article 9 (engaging) fund does not meet criteria: exclusion_percentage=None% (required: >= 20%), portfolio_coverage=None% (required: >= 90%)
compliance_issues.suggestion: Verify fund classification or ensure exclusion percentage >= 20% and portfolio coverage >= 90%

esg_level.description: Fund integrates ESG factors into its investment approach
